Module 0 — Fundamentals

Огляд модуля

1. Build process

2. Git

3. Cargo / Rust

4. Linux processes & daemons

5. Filesystem & permissions

6. Shell mechanics

7. tmux

8. SSH

9. WSL & Windows

⭐ Final quiz

Module 1 — Solana foundations

Огляд модуля

1. Cluster, network, node kinds

2. Slots, epochs, time

3. Leader, leader schedule

4. Block production

5. Validator status

6. Genesis ceremony

⭐ Final quiz

Module 2 — Account model

Огляд модуля

1. Account basics

2. Programs as accounts

3. Rent and rent-exempt

4. Token accounts & ATA

5. PDA deep dive

6. Token-2022

⭐ Final quiz

Module 3 — Transactions

Огляд модуля

1. TX anatomy

2. Instructions & CPI

3. Fees & priority

4. TX lifecycle

5. Versioned TX & ALTs

6. Durable nonces

⭐ Final quiz

Module 4 — Consensus ⭐

Огляд модуля

1. Proof of History

2. Tower BFT

3. Votes, credits, finality

4. Alpenglow (SIMD-0326)

5. Forks, lockouts

6. Slashing deep

7. Recent SIMDs

⭐ Final quiz

Module 5 — Networking

Огляд модуля

1. Gossip protocol

2. Turbine block propagation

3. Shreds & erasure coding

4. Repair protocol

5. QUIC & Fiber

⭐ Final quiz

Module 6 — Validator internals

Огляд модуля

1. TPU

2. TVU

3. AccountsDB

4. Banking & replay

5. Firedancer

⭐ Final quiz

Module 7 — Stake & rewards

Огляд модуля

1. Stake accounts

2. Inflation & rewards

3. MEV, Jito, BAM

4. SFDP & pools

5. Jito Block Engine deep

6. Stake split/merge

⭐ Final quiz

Module 8 — Operations security

Огляд модуля

1. Keypair hygiene

2. Backups & recovery

3. Monitoring & alerting

4. Upgrade safety

5. Hardware specs

6. Kernel & network tuning

7. Treasury multisig (Squads)

8. Monitoring stack (Prom+Grafana)

9. Oncall runbooks

⭐ Final quiz

Module 9 — CLI deep dive

Огляд модуля

1. Queries

2. Vote & stake ops

3. Transfers

4. Validator-side

5. Feature status

6. Benchmarking

⭐ Final quiz

Module 10 — Special topics

Огляд модуля

1. Geyser & RPC

2. Snapshots

3. DoubleZero

4. JIPs & SIMD governance

5. Snapshot mirror

6. Compression NFTs

7. Oracles

⭐ Final quiz

Глосарій

На цій сторінці

Glossary ​

Накопичувальний словник усіх термінів курсу. Сортовано алфавітом (англ.). Кожен term має посилання на module де deeper explanation.

A ​

Account — основна абстракція state на Solana. 5 fields: lamports, owner, data, executable, rent_epoch. Identify by Pubkey. Module 2.1

AccountsDB — validator's storage всіх accounts state. Mainnet ~500GB on NVMe + RAM cache. Alpenglow на tmpfs (RAM). Module 6.3

Account lock — Sealevel scheduler tracks which TXs touch which accounts. Writable accounts exclusive, read-only shared. Module 6.4

Activation epoch — epoch коли feature flag активується. До неї old behavior, після — new. Module 4.7

Active stake — SOL delegated до validators які зараз голосують (non-delinquent). Module 1.5

Address Lookup Table (ALT) — on-chain account containing list pubkeys. TX references via 1-byte index замість 32-byte pubkey. Дозволяє 256+ accounts у TX. Module 3.5

Alertmanager — Prometheus component для notifications. Maps alerts до channels (Slack, Telegram, PagerDuty). Module 8.8

Alpenglow — proposed next-gen Solana consensus protocol (SIMD-0326). BLS aggregated signatures, faster finality. Currently тестується community cluster. Module 4.4

Anchor — popular Rust framework для writing Solana smart contracts. Module 2.2

Atomicity — TX execute як єдиний unit: усі instructions success або жодна. Foundation of DeFi composability. Module 3.1

ATA (Associated Token Account) — deterministic token account для пари (owner_wallet, token_mint). Auto-derived, standard convention. Module 2.4

Authorized voter — key що signs vote TXs. Hot key OK (на сервері). Module 4.3

Authorized withdrawer — controls vote account: withdraw, change authorities, set commission. Critical key — cold storage mandatory mainnet. Module 4.3

AVX-512 — Intel CPU SIMD instruction set. Firedancer uses для accelerated sigverify. Module 6.5

B ​

Backup — copy critical data (keypairs, configs) у safe locations. Mandatory before destructive operations. Module 8.2

BAM (Block Assembly Marketplace) — Jito's permissioned block-building marketplace. Eligible validators receive bundles + tips. Module 7.3

Bank — internal термін для in-progress block state у validator memory. Module 1.4

Banking stage — leader mode component що executes TXs у parallel via Sealevel. Module 6.4

Base fee — 5000 lamports per signature. 50% burned, 50% leader. Module 3.3

Base58 — encoding для Solana pubkeys (легше читати ніж hex). Module 2.1

Binary — виконуваний файл, результат компіляції source code. ELF format на Linux. Module 0.1

Block — data container що зберігає всі TXs виконані у конкретному slot. Module 1.2

Block engine — Jito component що simulates blocks з bundles, picks best paying. Module 7.3

Block height — кількість blocks створених від genesis (виключає skipped slots). Module 1.2

Blockhash — унікальний відбиток block content. Використовується у TX як "recent blockhash" для expiry tracking. Module 1.2

Blockhash expiry — TX has ~150 slots (~60 sec) щоб бути included. Module 3.4

BLS signature — Boneh-Lynn-Shacham signature scheme. Дозволяє aggregation (many signers → one signature). Alpenglow uses. Module 4.4

Bootstrap validator — initial validator(s) у genesis. Define cluster's starting point. Module 1.6

Borsh — binary serialization format used by Solana programs. Module 3.2

BPF Loader — native program що loads + executes BPF programs. Current = BPF Loader Upgradeable. Module 2.2

BPF program — user-deployed smart contract. Compiled до BPF bytecode, executes у sandboxed BPF VM. Module 2.2

Branch (git) — рухомий покажчик на commit. Просувається з новими commits. Module 0.2

Bump seed — 0-255 value used у PDA derivation щоб find off-curve address. Module 2.5

Bundle (Jito) — group of TXs that execute together, submitted by searcher з tip. Module 7.3

Bytecode — compiled program format (BPF) що executes у BPF VM. Module 2.2

C ​

Cargo — Rust's build tool + package manager. Manages deps, compiles, installs. Module 0.3

Cargo.lock — exact dependency versions snapshot для reproducible builds. Module 0.3

Cargo.toml — Rust project manifest. Module 0.3

CARGO_INSTALL_ROOT — env variable specifying default install location. Module 0.3

Catch-up — validator's process recovering missed slots/blocks через repair protocol. Module 5.4

Checkout (git) — switch між commits/branches/tags. Module 0.2

Client diversity — multiple validator implementations (agave + Firedancer) для network resilience. Module 6.5

Cluster — група validators + RPC nodes що утворюють одну Solana network. Module 1.1

Cluster membership — list of all visible nodes у cluster, maintained через gossip. Module 5.1

cNFT (compressed NFT) — NFT з state compression. ~1000x cheaper ніж standard. Uses Merkle trees. Module 10.6

Coding shred — Reed-Solomon parity shred для erasure recovery. Module 5.3

Co-location — physically placing servers у tier-1 datacenter (Equinix). Critical для validator network latency. Module 8.5

Cold key — key stored offline. Rarely used. Для high-value operations (withdrawer authority). Module 8.1

Commission — % validator rewards operator takes (0-100%). Module 4.3

Commission bps — commission set у basis points (800 = 8%). Jito-Solana flag. Module 7.5

Commit (git) — snapshot стану repository у момент. SHA-1 hash, parent, message, author. Module 0.2

Compaction — periodic AccountsDB cleanup що merges write logs. Module 6.3

Compiler — translator з source code (Rust) до machine code (binary). Module 0.1

Compressed NFT (cNFT) — see cNFT. Module 10.6

Compute Budget Program — native program для controlling per-TX compute limits + priority fees. Module 3.3

Compute Unit (CU) — measure of operations у TX. Default budget 200,000 per TX. Module 3.2

Confidence interval — uncertainty range provided з oracle price. Module 10.7

Confidential transfers — Token-2022 extension hiding transfer amounts через zero-knowledge. Module 2.6

Confirmed (slot/TX) — ≥2/3 stake voted за block. Probabilistic finality. ~1-3 sec mainnet. Module 3.4

ContactInfo — gossip-published validator metadata: pubkey, IP+ports, version, timestamps. Module 5.1

Cooldown — stake state коли deactivating, чекає кінця epoch. Module 7.1

CPI (Cross-Program Invocation) — програма викликає інше program у тому ж TX. Module 3.2

CPU governor — Linux setting що manages CPU frequency scaling. "performance" governor для validators. Module 8.6

Crates.io — public Rust package registry. Module 0.3

D ​

Daemon — background process відв'язаний від terminal, managed by init system. Module 0.4

Data shred — shred containing actual block content. Module 5.3

Debug build — non-optimized binary з debug symbols. Не для production. Module 0.1

Delegation (stake) — direct stake account до specific validator. One stake account → one validator. Module 7.1

Delegator rewards — частка validator rewards до delegators proportional до їх stake. Module 7.2

Delinquent — validator status: не голосував > 128 slots на rooted slot. Recoverable. Module 1.5

Detached HEAD — git state коли HEAD вказує на commit/tag напряму, не на branch. Module 0.2

Devnet — Solana developer cluster. Free SOL з faucet, для testing apps. Module 1.1

Disaster recovery — procedure для restoring validator після catastrophic failure. Module 8.2

Discriminator — first bytes of instruction data що identifies which method. Anchor uses 8-byte hash. Module 3.2

Disinflation — gradual reduction inflation rate. Solana: 15% yearly. Module 7.2

DoubleZero — dedicated low-latency network для Solana validator-to-validator traffic. Module 10.3

Double-sign — validator signs two conflicting things (votes/blocks) at same slot. Slashable. Module 4.6

Double-vote — see [Double-sign]. Specifically vote-level double signing. Module 4.2

DPDK — Data Plane Development Kit, kernel-bypass networking framework. Used by Firedancer + Fiber. Module 5.5

Durable nonce — alternative до recent_blockhash для TX expiry. Long-lived. Module 3.6

DWPD — Drive Writes Per Day. SSD endurance metric. Enterprise NVMe usually 3-10 DWPD. Module 8.5

Dynamic linking — binary references shared .so libraries at runtime. Module 0.1

E ​

Entrypoint — well-known seed node для bootstrapping. Module 1.1

Environment variable — variable у shell environment. Accessed з $VAR. Module 0.6

Epoch — 432,000 slots ≈ 48 годин mainnet. Group of slots з спільним leader schedule. Module 1.2

Equinix — major datacenter operator (FR4 Frankfurt, AM3 Amsterdam, тощо). Validator co-location standard. Module 8.5

Equivocation — leader signs two different blocks for same slot. Slashable. Module 4.6

Erasure coding — Reed-Solomon redundancy: 32 data + 32 coding shreds, recover з будь-якими 32+. Module 5.3

Executable flag — account field: true для programs (call'able), false для data. Module 2.1

F ​

FEC set — group of shreds (typically 32 data + 32 coding) for Forward Error Correction. Module 5.3

Fee burn — 50% of TX fees permanently destroyed (deflationary). Module 3.3

Fee payer — first signer у TX. Платить fees. Module 3.1

Feature activation — moment коли feature flag перейде з pending до active. Епоch-aligned. Module 4.7

Feature flag — pubkey identifying protocol feature. Code includes both old + new behavior gated by flag status. Module 4.7

Feature pubkey — identifier for specific feature. Status checked via solana feature status. Module 4.7

Fetch (git) — download нові commits/tags з remote. Не modify working tree. Module 0.2

Fiber — newer agave networking layer using kernel-bypass для high-performance turbine. Module 5.5

Finalized (slot/TX) — vote depth 32 у tower. Cryptographic finality. ~12-30 sec mainnet. Module 3.4

fio — Linux disk I/O benchmark tool. Standard для validator hardware testing. Module 9.6

Firedancer — alternative validator client written у C by Jump Crypto. Performance + client diversity goal. Module 6.5

Fork — situation коли cluster has two competing chains. Module 4.5

Fork choice — algorithm для picking canonical fork. Heaviest stake-weighted wins. Module 4.5

Frankendancer — hybrid agave + Firedancer components (transition phase). Module 6.5

Freeze authority — wallet що може freeze token accounts. None = permissionless. Module 2.4

Full snapshot — complete accountsDB state at slot. Mainnet ~80-100 GB. Module 10.2

G ​

Garbage collection (accounts) — old system: accounts below rent threshold purged. Module 2.3

Genesis — initial state cluster. All nodes мають однаковий genesis. Module 1.1

Genesis ceremony — coordinated process to launch new cluster з shared genesis file. Module 1.6

Genesis hash — unique fingerprint genesis. Identifies cluster. Module 1.1

Geyser — Solana plugin system для streaming live data з validator. Module 10.1

Glob — shell wildcard expansion (*, ?, [abc]). Expanded by shell ДО execution. Module 0.6

Gossip — epidemic protocol для propagating cluster membership + metadata. Module 5.1

Grafana — visualization tool для time-series data. Used з Prometheus для validator monitoring. Module 8.8

H ​

Halt threshold — % delinquent stake beyond which cluster halts. Mainnet 33%, Alpenglow ~18%. Module 1.5

Hardlink — alternative filename для того ж inode. Module 0.5

HEAD (git) — pointer "де ти зараз" у repo. Module 0.2

Heaviest fork rule — Solana fork choice: canonical fork = з найбільшим stake voting. Module 4.5

Helius — popular Solana RPC provider з Geyser-enhanced services + cNFT indexing. Module 10.1

Heredoc — shell construct для multi-line input. <<EOF ... EOF. Module 0.6

Hot key — key used continuously by software, on server. Module 8.1

Hugepages — large memory pages (2MB/1GB) для efficient buffering. Used by Firedancer + Fiber. Module 5.5

Hyper-V — Microsoft virtualization platform. Backs WSL2. Module 0.9

I ​

Identity rotation — replacing validator identity key. Via agave-validator set-identity. Use carefully avoid double-sign. Module 4.6

Incident response — structured handling of operational alerts. Ack → assess → mitigate → investigate → document. Module 8.9

Incremental snapshot — delta from last full snapshot. Small (~1 GB), created every ~100 slots. Module 10.2

In-genesis — validators included у cluster's initial genesis (vs out-of-genesis joining later). Module 1.6

Inflation pool — нові SOL minted per epoch, distributed до validators proportional до credits. Module 7.2

Inflation rate — annual % new SOL supply created. ~5% currently, disinflating. Module 7.2

Init system — first process boot Linux (PID 1). systemd = standard. Module 0.4

Inode — internal filesystem structure з file metadata + pointer до data blocks. Module 0.5

Instruction — atomic unit у TX. Specifies program, accounts, data. Module 3.1

invoke_signed — CPI mechanism whereby program "signs" як PDA через seeds. Module 2.5

IOPS — I/O Operations Per Second. Disk benchmark metric. Mainnet target > 200k random 4k read. Module 9.6

iperf3 — network bandwidth benchmark tool. Module 9.6

J ​

JIP (Jito Improvement Proposal) — Jito DAO governance proposal. Module 10.4

Jito — major MEV infrastructure provider для Solana. Module 7.3

Jito-Solana — fork agave validator з MEV functionality. ~50% mainnet stake runs це. Module 7.3

JitoSOL — Jito's liquid staking token. Module 7.3

journald — systemd's logging system. Read через journalctl. Module 0.4

JTO — Jito DAO governance token. Votes на JIPs. Module 10.4

Jump Crypto — trading firm creating Firedancer. Module 6.5

K ​

Kernel bypass — networking technique routing packets directly до user-space (skip kernel). Fiber + Firedancer use. Module 5.5

Key rotation — periodic replacement keys. Module 8.2

L ​

Lamport — найменша одиниця SOL. 1 SOL = 10^9 lamports. Module 2.1

Lamport credits — Alpenglow epochCredits semantics: actual lamport reward earned (НЕ vote count). Module 4.4

Last vote — slot of validator's most recent vote. Module 1.5

Layer (turbine) — tree level. Layer 1 receives від leader first. Module 5.2

Leader — validator що має ексклюзивне право створити block у specific slot. Module 1.3

Leader schedule — pre-computed мапа slot → validator pubkey для всього epoch. Module 1.3

Leader slot group — consecutive slots assigned одному leader (4 на mainnet). Module 1.3

Linker — частина build process що з'єднує object files + libraries у final binary. Module 0.1

Liquid staking token (LST) — token representing staked SOL з liquidity. JitoSOL, mSOL. Module 7.4

Lockout — Tower BFT commitment: validator не голосує за конфліктуючий fork. Exponential: depth N = 2^N slots. Module 4.2

M ​

Mainnet-beta — Solana's production cluster. Module 1.1

Merge stake — combine two compatible stake accounts. Module 7.6

Merkle tree — binary tree з hash combinations. Used у state compression. Module 10.6

Merkle proof — sequence hashes proving specific item belongs to Merkle tree root. Module 10.6

MEV (Maximum Extractable Value) — profit з smart TX ordering у block. Module 7.3

Micro-lamport — 1/1,000,000 of lamport. Unit для priority fee bids. Module 3.3

Mint — token type-defining account. Stores mint authority, supply, decimals. Module 2.4

Mint authority — pubkey that може mint нові tokens. Module 2.4

Mode (file permissions) — rwxrwxrwx bits для u/g/o. Module 0.5

Monitoring — observability of system health. Module 8.3

Multicast — sending data до multiple recipients. Turbine uses tree multicast. Module 5.2

Multisig — wallet вимагає N-of-M signatures. Squads = standard Solana implementation. Module 8.1

N ​

Native program — built into agave validator binary. System, Vote, Stake, BPF Loader. Module 2.2

Network partition — cluster splits into halves через network failure. Module 4.5

N-of-M — multisig threshold notation. 3-of-5 = need 3 signatures з 5 keys. Module 8.7

node_exporter — Prometheus exporter для Linux system metrics (CPU, RAM, disk, network). Module 8.8

Nonce account — on-chain account holding durable nonce value. Module 3.6

Nonce authority — key controlling nonce account (can advance, withdraw). Module 3.6

Non-transferable — Token-2022 extension making tokens soul-bound. Module 2.6

NUMA — Non-Uniform Memory Access. Multi-socket server architecture. Pinning validator до one NUMA node для consistent performance. Module 8.6

NVMe — NVM Express. Modern fast SSD interface. Required для validator (random I/O performance). Module 8.5

O ​

Object file — intermediate compile output (.o файли). Module 0.1

Off-curve point — pubkey not on ed25519 curve. PDAs are off-curve (no private key exists). Module 2.5

Offline signing — sign TX без internet connection (cold wallet pattern). Use durable nonces. Module 3.6

Oracle — bridge від off-chain data до on-chain. Pyth, Switchboard. Module 10.7

Orphaned block — block on losing fork після resolution. TXs reverted. Module 4.5

Out-of-genesis — validators joining cluster ПІСЛЯ initial genesis (LumLabs Alpenglow case). Module 1.6

Owner (account) — program який володіє правом modify account state. Не wallet owner. Module 2.1

P ​

Pane (tmux) — split window section. Module 0.7

Path — file system location. Absolute (/home/...) або relative. Module 0.5

PATH (env var) — colon-separated list of directories де shell searches для executables. Module 0.6

PBFT (Practical Byzantine Fault Tolerance) — classical consensus algorithm. Tower BFT = PBFT + PoH variant. Module 4.2

PDA (Program Derived Address) — special pubkey derived deterministically з seeds + program ID. No private key. Module 2.5

Pending feature — feature flag scheduled to activate at specific future epoch. Module 4.7

Permanent delegate — Token-2022 extension. Mint authority can always move/burn tokens. Module 2.6

Permission — access rights для file/directory: read (r), write (w), execute (x). Module 0.5

PID (Process ID) — unique number identifying running process. Module 0.4

Pipe — shell | connecting stdout одного command до stdin наступного. Module 0.6

PoH (Proof of History) — cryptographic clock через recursive SHA-256 hashing. NOT consensus itself. Module 4.1

PoH bottleneck — PoH single-threaded, requires high single-thread CPU performance. Module 8.5

PoH leader — validator generating PoH sequence у its slot. Module 4.1

PoH service — validator thread що continuously runs hashing loop. Module 6.4

Port forwarding — SSH feature forwarding ports between local і remote. Module 0.8

Post-mortem — post-incident analysis document. Module 8.9

Prefix key (tmux) — combo activating tmux command mode. Default: Ctrl+B. Module 0.7

Price feed — oracle data feed для specific market price. Module 10.7

Priority fee — optional pay-per-CU для leader prioritization у congestion. Module 3.3

Private key — secret half asymmetric keypair. Never share. Module 0.8

Process — running program у memory. Module 0.4

Processed (slot/TX) — validator's local view: TX received and executed. Module 3.4

Program ID — pubkey of executable program account. Module 2.2

Prometheus — time-series database + scraper для metrics. Standard validator monitoring. Module 8.8

ProxyJump — SSH feature для tunneling через bastion host. Module 0.8

Pubkey — 32-byte public key identifying account. Base58 encoded. Module 2.1

Public key — public half asymmetric keypair. Safe to share. Module 0.8

Public snapshot — HTTP-accessible snapshot mirror для community catch-up. Module 10.5

Pull dashboard — external service polls validator API для monitoring. Module 8.3

Push alert — validator-side bot sends notifications. Module 8.3

Pyth — institutional financial data oracle. First-party publishers, sub-second latency. Module 10.7

Q ​

QUIC — modern transport protocol (UDP-based з reliability). Solana TPU uses. Module 5.5

R ​

Realms — Solana governance framework. JTO voting на JIPs. Module 10.4

Recent blockhash — hash recent block included у TX для expiry tracking. Module 3.1

Redirect — shell I/O redirection: > (stdout), 2>&1 (stderr → stdout). Module 0.6

Reed-Solomon — erasure coding algorithm. Solana shreds use. Module 5.3

Regional BE — geographically-distributed Jito Block Engines (Frankfurt, NY, Tokyo, etc.). Module 7.5

Release build — optimized binary для production. cargo build --release. Module 0.1

Reorg — cluster reorganizes around different fork. Дуже rare на Solana. Module 4.5

Repair — protocol для requesting missing shreds/slots від peers. Module 5.4

Replay stage — validator component що executes TXs у received block. Module 6.2

Repository (git) — directory з versioned code + history. Module 0.2

Rent — economic mechanism для storage costs. Current: rent-exempt threshold. Module 2.3

Rent-exempt — account має ≥ threshold lamports щоб never need to pay rent. Module 2.3

Rent reserve — lamports locked у account для rent-exempt. Returned at close. Module 2.3

Rollback — revert до previous version (after failed upgrade). Module 8.4

Root slot — validator's highest finalized slot. Module 1.5

Rooted slot — slot reached depth 32 у tower (lockout ~forever). Module 4.2

RPC node — full node з RPC enabled, не voting. Module 1.1

Runbook — pre-written step-by-step procedure для common incidents. Module 8.9

S ​

scp — secure copy через SSH. Module 0.8

Searcher — algorithmic trader looking для MEV opportunities. Submits bundles до Jito. Module 7.3

Sealevel — Solana runtime для parallel TX execution. Module 3.2

Seeds (PDA) — input bytes для PDA derivation. Determines uniqueness. Module 2.5

Self-stake — validator operator stakes own SOL до own validator. Module 7.1

SEV (severity) — incident classification: critical, warning, info. Module 8.9

SFDP (Solana Foundation Delegation Program) — Foundation delegates stake до qualifying validators free. Module 7.4

SHA-256 — cryptographic hash function. Used у PoH. Module 4.1

Shell — command interpreter (bash, zsh). Module 0.6

Shred — block fragment, 1280 bytes. Block split into ~64 shreds. Module 5.3

Shred publisher — DoubleZero role: validator що broadcasts shreds через DZ. Module 10.3

Shred version — cluster identifier (related до genesis). Module 5.1

SIGHUP — Linux signal sent process коли controlling terminal closes. Module 0.4

Signature aggregation — combining many signers' signatures into one (BLS scheme). Module 4.4

Signature (TX) — 64-byte Ed25519 signature над TX message. Module 3.1

Signer — account marked as requiring signature у instruction. Module 3.1

Sigverify — TPU stage що verifies signatures. GPU-accelerated якщо є GPU. Module 6.1

SIMD (Solana Improvement Document) — Solana Foundation governance proposal. Module 10.4

SIMD repo — github.com/solana-foundation/solana-improvement-documents. Все SIMD proposals. Module 4.7

Skip rate — % validator's leader slots що стали skipped. Health metric. Mainnet target < 5%. Module 1.3

Skipped slot — slot з 0 blocks produced. Module 1.2

Slashing — penalty (stake reduction) для malicious behavior. Module 4.2

Slashing condition — protocol-defined violation triggering slashing. Module 4.6

Slot — 400ms time window. One leader per slot. Module 1.2

Snapshot — compressed accountsDB state dump at slot. Module 5.4 / Module 10.2

Snapshot mirror — HTTP server serving public snapshots для community. Module 10.5

solana-bench-tps — Solana CLI tool для measuring cluster TX throughput. Module 9.6

solana-genesis — Solana CLI tool для creating new cluster genesis. Module 1.6

Source code — text written by human, before compilation. Module 0.1

SPL Token — standard token program на Solana (legacy). Module 2.4

Split stake — divide stake account into two. Module 7.6

Squads — popular Solana multisig wallet. Industry standard для org treasuries. Module 8.7

ssh-agent — utility holding decrypted SSH keys у memory. Module 0.8

Stake account — account з owner = Stake Program, stores SOL для delegation. Module 7.1

Stake activation — process whereby new delegation становить active. Epoch-aligned. Module 1.2

Staker authority — key permitting delegate/redelegate stake. Module 7.1

Stake pool — smart contract collecting retail SOL і delegating до validators. JitoSOL, Marinade. Module 7.4

Stake redelegation — change stake delegation від one validator до another. Needs deactivation + reactivation. Module 7.6

Stake snapshot — frozen state stakes at epoch boundary. Used для leader schedule. Module 1.3

Stake state — stake account current phase: Initialized, Activating, Active, Deactivating, Inactive. Module 7.1

Stake-weighted QUIC — TPU prioritization для known stake-holders, anti-spam. Module 5.5

Stake-weighted vote — voting power proportional до stake amount. Module 10.4

StakeNet — Solana system для governing stake pool delegations через Steward Config. Module 7.4

State compression — Solana technique storing data у Merkle trees замість individual accounts. Module 10.6

Stash (git) — temporarily set aside uncommitted changes. Module 0.2

Static linking — compiler embeds libraries inside binary. Module 0.1

Steward Config — StakeNet on-chain config defining stake pool validator selection criteria. NOT same as JIP-31/37. Module 7.4

Switchboard — general-purpose decentralized oracle. Module 10.7

Symlink — symbolic link, file containing path до another file. Module 0.5

Symlink swap — rename symlink point до new target. Atomic version switch. Module 8.4

sysbench — multi-purpose Linux benchmark tool (CPU, memory, threads). Module 9.6

sysctl — Linux kernel runtime parameter tuning. Critical для validator (UDP buffers, swap, file descriptors). Module 8.6

System Program — native program (11111...) для basic SOL operations. Module 2.1

systemd — modern Linux init system. Manages daemons (services). Module 0.4

T ​

Tag (git) — immutable pointer до specific commit. Module 0.2

target/ directory — cargo build output directory. Module 0.1

Testnet — Solana pre-production cluster. Module 1.1

Threshold signing — multisig requires N-of-M signatures. Module 8.7

THP (Transparent Huge Pages) — Linux feature що may cause latency spikes. Disable для validators. Module 8.6

Tick (PoH) — basic time unit у PoH. ~64/sec mainnet. Module 4.1

Tip account — special PDA holding Jito tip payments. Module 7.5

Tip distribution — Jito mechanism splitting tips operator vs stakers. Module 7.5

tmpfs — RAM-backed filesystem. Used для Alpenglow accountsDB. Module 6.3

tmux — terminal multiplexer. Persistent sessions surviving SSH disconnect. Module 0.7

Token account — SPL Token account holding balance. Owned by SPL Token Program. Module 2.4

Token-2022 — newer SPL token standard з extensions support. Module 2.6

Token extensions — Token-2022 opt-in features per token. Module 2.6

Tower — Tower BFT's per-validator vote stack (max 32 deep). Module 4.2

Tower BFT — Solana's current mainnet consensus algorithm. PBFT + PoH variant. Module 4.2

Tower file — validator's local tower (vote history) у ~/.solana/tower-N.bin. Delete before restore avoid double-sign. Module 4.6

TPU (Transaction Processing Unit) — validator's incoming TX path. Module 6.1

Transaction (TX) — atomic unit of execution. Max 1232 bytes. Module 3.1

Transfer fees — Token-2022 extension taking % per transfer. Module 2.6

Transfer hooks — Token-2022 extension running custom program per transfer. Module 2.6

Transient stake — stake у activating/deactivating state. Restricts split/merge. Module 7.6

Triton One — major Solana RPC provider, low-latency focus. Yellowstone Geyser framework. Module 10.1

TSDB — Time-Series Database. Prometheus uses TSDB для metrics storage. Module 8.8

Tunnel (DZ) — DoubleZero virtual tunnel між validator і DZ network. Module 10.3

Turbine — Solana's block propagation protocol. Hierarchical tree multicast. Module 5.2

Turbine tree — per-slot dynamically built tree для shred distribution. Module 5.2

TVU (Transaction Validation Unit) — validator's incoming blocks path. Module 6.2

TX forwarding — non-leader validator forwards received TXs до current/upcoming leaders. Module 6.1

U ​

ulimits — per-user resource limits (file descriptors, processes). Critical для validator. Module 8.6

Unit file — systemd service config. Module 0.4

Upgrade authority — key able to redeploy BPF program code. Set to None = immutable. Module 2.2

V ​

Validator — node з vote account + stake що бере участь у consensus. Module 1.1

Validator Admission Ticket (VAT) — Alpenglow-specific: 1.6 SOL/epoch required для participation. Module 4.4

Validator rewards — operator income: inflation share + fees + Jito tips. Module 7.2

Vault account — Squads multisig PDA holding funds. Module 8.7

V0 transaction — Versioned transaction format (default since 2023). Module 3.5

Versioned transaction — TX format supporting ALTs. V0 currently. Module 3.5

Vote authority — key permitting sign vote TXs. Hot key on validator server. Module 4.3

Vote credit — Tower BFT: 1 per successful vote landed. Alpenglow: lamport reward. Module 4.3

VRF (Verifiable Random Function) — cryptographic randomness function. Used у leader schedule. Module 1.3

VRF (Switchboard) — verifiable random number service на Solana. Module 10.7

W ​

wait-for-restart-window — agave-validator subcommand blocking until safe to restart. Module 8.4

Warmup — stake state коли activating. Module 1.2

Window (tmux) — full-screen terminal у tmux session. Module 0.7

Withdrawer authority — vote/stake account control key. Critical. Cold storage mandatory mainnet. Module 4.3

Working tree (git) — current files у repo на disk. Module 0.2

WSL — Windows Subsystem для Linux. WSL2 — full Linux kernel у Hyper-V VM. Module 0.9

Y ​

Yellowstone — Triton One's gRPC streaming framework для Geyser. Module 10.1

Z ​

zstd — fast compression algorithm. Used для Solana snapshots. Module 10.2

~230 terms. Updates з each module/section addition.

Last updated:

Pager
Попередньо⭐ Final quiz
